message.content:
Based on the provided design system reference document page, here are all the extractable design specifications:

### Colors
- Secondary accent palette: peach, green, blue, red
- Background: cream/white

### Typography
- No specific font family or sizes mentioned in this section

### Spacing
- Hover state duration: 150-250ms
- Hover scale: 1.02-1.05x

### Motion & Effects
- Scroll-based reveals: simple fade/slide-up on section entry
- Hover states: color shift, slight scale (1.02-1.05x), or underline animation on links
- Motion style: restrained, not flashy
- Motion purpose: add warmth (wink, subtle illustration loop) rather than to impress

### Imagery & Illustration Style
- Illustration style: hand-drawn, off-kilter, slightly imperfect
- Illustration palette: brand's secondary accent colors against cream/white
- Mascot/character: simple, single-color/silhouette-friendly, consistently paired with wordmark
- Photography style: warm, candid, real-people-in-real-small-business-settings (not overly polished stock photography)
- Icon style: simple line or solid single-color icons (not skeuomorphic or heavily detailed)

### Voice & Microcopy
- Voice: active voice, plain verbs, sentence case
- Button copy examples: "Start Free Trial," "See Pricing," "Learn More"
- Avoid vague button copy: "Submit," "Click Here"
- Headline structure: confident statement + softening, witty second clause
- Empty/error states: explained plainly in product's voice (never apologetic or robotic)

### Avoided Elements
- Parallax-heavy effects
- 3D tilts
- Glassmorphism blur
- Heavy gradients
- Neon glows

Note: This page doesn't contain specific values for border radius, button styles, card styles, shadows, badges, or inputs - those specifications would likely be in other sections of the design system document.
